title: Tala Patterned Design Paper Jam Pot Covers (Pack of 12)
features: Our set is great for sealing and labelling your homemade preserves.

Simply pot the jam and cover with a waxed disc, while the preserve is still piping hot. When the jam is slightly cold, this should be topped with a damp cellophane disc and secured with an elastic band.
Our set contains approximately 12 decorative covers, 12 labels, 12 wax discs, 12 transparent discs and 12 elastic bands.
They are suitable for 1lb Jam Jars and make the ideal gift for friends and family.
TRUSTED TALA QUALITY: Part of Tala’s traditional kitchenware collection, trusted by home bakers and preservers since 1899
description: From the brand Previous page Tala is one of the oldest and best loved kitchenware brands. A trusted supplier, of baking and cake decorating equipment since 1899, Tala has grown to supply cooks and bakers all over the world. Today, Tala manufactures products in numerous sites across the UK including Liverpool, Accrington, Norfolk, Suffolk and Burnley. Traditional methods are still used to manufacture most Tala products. Tala Naturals Storage Tins Non-Stick Bakeware Icing Sets and Bags Tala Originals Cooks Measure Preserve and Storage Tools and Gadgets Tala Originals Shaker Tala Performance Cookware Cupcake Cases Food prep Knives Cutters What makes our products unique? Tala products, crafted since 1899, blend heritage, craftsmanship, and innovation for superior performance in baking and kitchenware. Why we love what we do? We love what we do because we’re passionate about empowering people to create and enjoy moments that matter—whether it’s baking a family favourite, preparing a special meal, or sharing a tradition passed down through generations. Are all our products high-end? Yes, Tala products are renowned for their exceptional craftsmanship, made with care using durable, responsibly sourced materials for lasting performance. Next page
